title: Kerala High Court refuses to lift ban on use of Munnar glass bridge, asks Collector to decide
description: The Kerala High Court recently refused to grant interim relief against an order prohibiting the use of a glass bridge in Munnar, a popular attraction in the hill town [Neonova Munnar LLP v State of Kerala & ors]. A bench of Justice Gopinath P and Justice Johnson John said that concerns relating to public safety outweigh the need for immediate interference with the order of a single-judge who had refused to stay the ban.The Court observed that the single-judge was justified in declining to st
